note: Real-data local single-host (ADR-0004) candidate identity for the issue #30 promotion report. Unlike promotion-candidate.local.json (which anchors every gate to the deterministic acceptance-fixture candidate on https://127.0.0.1:3443), this config describes the real production container the harness measures the data-plane gates against: build ee7313f serving the real V202601 candidate-market artifact ca688ed1 + product-search catalog aa1f4027, whose /healthz and /api/v1/analyses/current attest the nine live fields below. A fixture-anchored report can never accept target-load because the acceptance fixture exposes only ~41 products while the candidate mixed-load gate requires 337 distinct trade-explorer-200 keys, so the data-plane gates must run against the real catalog. fixtureManifestSha256 stays pinned to ACCEPTANCE_FIXTURE_CONTENT_SHA256: it attests the deterministic contract gates (source-and-domain, coalescing-and-capacity, http-cache-and-deadlines, recurring-cost) that are measured in-process against the acceptance fixture regardless of the candidate's real analysis build.
